mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_grade (grade_id, student_id, course_id, teacher_id, score, grade_level, gpa, entry_time, status) VALUES (#{gradeId}, #{studentId}, #{courseId}, #{teacherId}, #{score}, #{gradeLevel}, #{gpa}, #{entryTime}, #{status})

INSERT INTO t_grade (grade_id, student_id, course_id, teacher_id, score, grade_level, gpa, entry_time, status) VALUES
(#{item.gradeId}, #{item.studentId}, #{item.courseId}, #{item.teacherId}, #{item.score}, #{item.gradeLevel}, #{item.gpa}, #{item.entryTime}, #{item.status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_grade WHERE student_id=#{studentId} ORDER BY entry_time DESC
SELECT * FROM t_grade WHERE course_id=#{courseId} ORDER BY student_id
SELECT * FROM t_grade WHERE teacher_id=#{teacherId} ORDER BY course_id, student_id
mapper.update: UPDATE t_grade SET status=#{status} WHERE grade_id=#{gradeId}
mapper.select: SELECT AVG(score) FROM t_grade WHERE course_id=#{courseId} AND score IS NOT NULL
